en: I'll keep on making those new mistakes
I'll keep on making them every day
Those new mistakes
Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh Try everything
Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh Try everything
Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh Try everything
Oh-oh-oh-oh-oh-oh
Try everything
I'm Gizelle. Welcome to Zootopia.
ko: 난 가젤이야. 주토피아에 온 걸 환영해.

en: Excuse me? Down here. Hi.
Oh. M. Goodness. They really did hire a bunny.
What?! I gotta tell you, you are even cuter than I thought you'd be.
ko: 뭐?! 솔직히 생각보다 훨씬 더 귀엽잖아.

en: You probably didn't know, but a bunny can call another bunny cute.
ko: 아마 몰랐겠지만, 토끼끼리는 귀엽다고 해도 돼.

en: But when other animals do it, it's a little...
I am so sorry. Me, Benjamin Clawhauser.
The guy everyone thinks is just a flabby, donut-loving cop stereotyping you.
ko: 다들 그냥 뚱뚱한 도넛 좋아하는 경찰이 편견 갖는다고 생각하는 바로 그 사람이에요.

en: Oh. It's okay. Oh, you've actually got... there's a...
ko: 아. 괜찮아요. 아, 실은 여기... 뭔가...

en: A what? In your neck, the...
Oh, where you went, you little dickens?
I should get to roll call. So, which way do I...
Oh, bullpen's over there to the left. Great. Thank you.
ko: 아, 대기실은 저기 왼쪽이에요. 좋아요. 감사합니다.

en: Aw, that poor little buddy's gonna get eaten alive.
ko: 에고, 저 불쌍한 녀석 산 채로 잡아먹히겠네.

en: All right, everybody sit. I've got three items on the docket.
ko: 좋아, 다 앉아. 안건이 세 가지야.

en: First, we need to acknowledge the elephant in the room.
Francine. Happy birthday. Oh, yeah?
Oh, oh. Number two, there are some new recruits with us I should introduce,
ko: 둘째, 새 신입이 있는데 소개해야 하지만,

en: but I'm not going to because I don't care.
Finally, we have 14 missing mammal cases.
All predators, from a giant polar bear to a teensy little otter.
ko: 모두 포식자야, 거대한 북극곰부터 아주 작은 수달까지.

en: And City Hall is right up my tail to find them.
This is priority number one.
Listen, I don't know what you're doing skulking around there in daylight hours,
ko: 이봐, 낮에 여기서 뭘 어슬렁거리는 건진 모르겠지만,

en: but I don't want any trouble in here. So hit the road.
I'm not looking for any trouble either, sir.
I simply want to buy a jumbo pop for my little boy.
ko: 그냥 아들한테 점보 팝 하나 사주고 싶을 뿐이에요.

en: You want the red or the blue, pal?
ko: 빨간 거 줄까 파란 거 줄까?

en: Oh, I'm such a... Oh, come on, kid. Back up. Listen, buddy.
ko: 아이고, 나 정말... 이리 와, 얘야. 비켜봐. 이봐,

en: What, there aren't any Fox ice cream joints in your part of town?
ko: 뭐, 너네 동네에는 여우 아이스크림 가게 없어?

en: No, no, there are. There are.
It's just, my boy, this goofy little stinker,
ko: 그냥, 우리 아들이, 이 바보 같은 녀석이,

en: he loves all things elephant, wants to be one when he grows up.
ko: 코끼리를 엄청 좋아해서 크면 코끼리가 되고 싶대요.

en: Is that adorable? Who the heck am I to crush his little dreams, huh?
ko: 사랑스럽지 않아요? 이 꼬마의 작은 꿈을 누가 짓밟겠어요?

en: Right? Look, you probably can't read Fox, but the sign says,
ko: 그렇죠? 봐요, 여우 글을 못 읽겠지만 간판에,

en: we reserve the right to refuse service to anyone.
ko: 서비스를 거부할 권리가 있다고 써 있어.

en: So beat it. You're holding up the line.
Ah! Hello? Excuse me.
Hey, you're gonna have to wait your turn like everyone else, meter maid.
ko: 야, 다른 사람들처럼 줄 서서 기다려, 주차 단속원.

en: Actually, I'm an officer. Just had a quick question.
ko: 사실 저 경찰관인데요. 질문이 하나 있어서요.

en: Are your customers aware they're getting snot and mucus with their cookies and cream?
ko: 손님들이 코 풀고 콧물 묻은 쿠키앤크림을 먹고 있는 거 아시나요?

en: What are you talking about? Well, I don't want to cause you any trouble,
ko: 무슨 소리야? 문제 만들고 싶지 않지만,

en: but I believe scooping ice cream with an ungloved trunk is a Class 3 health code violation.
ko: 장갑 안 낀 코로 아이스크림을 푸는 건 3등급 위생법 위반이거든요.

en: Which is kind of a big deal.
Of course, I could let you off with a warning if you would have gloved those trunks and, I don't know,
finished selling this nice dad and his son a...
ko: 이 친절한 아빠와 아들한테 파시던 거 마저 파시면 경고로 넘어갈게요.

en: What was it? A Jumbo Pop. Please.
A Jumbo Pop. $15.
Thank you so much. Thank you.
Oh, no. Are you kidding me? I don't have my wallet.
I'd lose my head if it weren't attached to my neck. That's the truth.
ko: 목에 안 달려 있으면 머리도 잃어버릴 판이에요. 정말이에요.

en: Oh, boy. I'm sorry, pal. Gotta be about the worst birthday ever.
Please don't be mad at me. Thanks anyway.
Keep the change. Officer, I can't thank you enough.
So kind. Really. Can I pay you back?
Oh, no. My treat. It's just...
You know, it burns me up to see folks with such backward attitudes toward foxes.
ko: 여우에 대해 그런 편견 가진 사람들 보면 정말 화가 나서요.

en: I just want to say you're a great dad and just a...
a real articulate fella.
Oh, well, that is high praise. It's rare that I find someone so non-patronizing.
ko: 어머, 그건 정말 칭찬이네요. 이렇게 편견 없는 사람 만나기 힘든데.

en: Officer... Hops. Mr... Wild. Nick Wild.
ko: 경관님... 홉스예요. 선생님... 와일드. 닉 와일드.

en: And you, little guy, you want to be an elephant when you grow up?
ko: 그리고 너, 꼬마야, 크면 코끼리가 되고 싶다고?

en: You be an elephant. Because this is Utopia.
Anyone can be anything. Beep!
ko: 누구든 뭐든 될 수 있어. 삐!

en: Oh! Sorry. Coming through.
Excuse me. Excuse me. Pardon.
Bon voyage, flatfoot! Oh!
Hey!
Hey! Stop right there!
Have a donut, copper! Oh, my God!
Did you see those leopard print jeggings? Run!
ko: 저 표범 무늬 레깅스 봤어? 도망쳐!

en: Oh! I love your hair.
Thank you. Come to Papa.
Well, I was hoping you could run a plate for us.
ko: 번호판 조회 좀 해주실 수 있나요.

en: We are in a really big hurry. Sure.
What's the... 29T... Number.
THD03. T...
03. Zero. Three!
Hey, Flash, want to hear a joke? No!
ko: 야, 플래시, 농담 하나 들을래? 안 돼!

en: Sure. What do you call a three-humped camel?
ko: 좋아. 혹이 세 개인 낙타를 뭐라고 불러?

en: I don't know.
What do you call a...
Three-humped camel. Three-humped camel.
ko: 세 혹 낙타. 세 혹 낙타.

en: Pregnant.
Uh... Uh... Uh...
Yes, very funny, very funny. Can we please just focus on the text?
ko: 그래 재밌다, 재밌어. 번호판 좀 봐줄 수 있어?

en: Hey, Priscilla. Oh, no!
Yes? Flash?
What do you call...
A three-humped camel? Pregnant! Okay, great, we got it!
ko: 세 혹 낙타? 임신한 낙타! 됐어, 알았다고!

en: Three-humped...
So fluffy. Hey! Sheep never let me get this close.
ko: 너무 폭신해. 야! 양이 이렇게 가까이 온 적 없는데.

en: You can't just touch a sheep's wool! It's like cotton candy. Stop it!
ko: 양 털을 함부로 만지면 안 돼! 솜사탕 같아. 그만해!

en: Where to? Uh, Rainforest District. Vine and Tujunga.
There! Traffic cams for the whole city! Well, this is so exciting, actually.
ko: 저기! 전 도시 교통 카메라야! 사실 이거 정말 신나요.

en: I mean, well, you know, I never get to do anything this important.
ko: 이렇게 중요한 일을 해본 적이 없어서요.

en: But you're the assistant mayor of Zootopia. Oh, I'm more of a glorified secretary.
ko: 근데 주토피아 부시장잖아요. 아, 그냥 비서나 다름없어요.

en: I think Mayor Lionheart just wanted the sheep vote.
ko: 라이언하트 시장이 양 표 때문에 뽑은 것 같아요.

en: But he did give me that nice mug. Oh.
Feels good to be appreciated. Smellweather!
Ah, that's a fun little name he likes to use.
I called him Lionfart once. He did not care for that.
Let me tell you, it was not a good day for me. Yes, sir? I thought you were going to cancel my afternoon.
ko: 그날 정말 안 좋았어요. 네, 각하? 오후 일정 취소하시려는 건가요?

en: Oh, dear. I better go. Let me know what you find.
It was really nice for me to be... While we're young, Smellweather!
ko: 정말 좋았어요 저한테... 빨리 와, 스멜웨더!

en: You think when she goes to sleep, she counts herself? Oh, shush.
ko: 양이 잠들면 자기를 세는 걸까? 쉿.
